query:
SELECT 
  e.id,
  e.corretorId,
  u.name as corretor_nome,
  u.email as corretor_email,
  DATE_FORMAT(e.data, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as data_formatada,
  e.aceitouFollowUp,
  DATE_FORMAT(e.createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as criado_em
FROM escolha_diaria_follow_up e
LEFT JOIN users u ON e.corretorId = u.id
ORDER BY e.createdAt DESC;

  e.aceitouFollowUp,
  DATE_FORMAT(e.createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as criado_em
FROM escolha_diaria_follow_up e
LEFT JOIN users u ON e.corretorId = u.id
ORDER BY e.createdAt DESC;
